items.title: Vertiv's AI-Powered Portfolio Gaining Traction: What's Ahead?
items.description: VRT's AI-focused portfolio is fueling rapid data center growth, lifting orders, backlog, and sales outlook as global AI adoption accelerates.

items.title: This Blue-Chip Stock Topped the Dow Jones in 2025. Should You Buy Its Shares Here?
items.description: Caterpillar shares are already on track to closing 2025 with a nearly 60% gain – but Citi analysts believe CAT stock isn’t out of juice just yet.

items.title: Why the ‘Everyone’s a Winner’ Energy Trade Can’t Last Forever
items.description: Almost every corner of the power sector has rallied this year.  In the earlier days of the AI rally, investors piled into the stocks of nuclear and natural-gas power plant owners such as  Constellation Energy  and  Vistra  Since then, the rally has spread to almost every corner of the electricity universe.  Take renewable-energy stocks, which started the year weak as the sector’s subsidies landed on the chopping block as part of the One Big Beautiful Bill Act.
